description: User pauses to examine the 'Short tasks' section on the Explore page, focusing on the available opportunities.
frame_description: The Explore screen shows a 'Short tasks' section with a pink card offering $25 for app feedback.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks' carousel, moving the $25 task card to the left to reveal a new $8 task card.
frame_description: The carousel has shifted horizontally; the pink card is now on the left and a yellow card with a $8 reward is visible on the right.
